subject: Fix to get main SDNC pod to come up
commit_message:
Fix to get main SDNC pod to come up

Change-Id: I2a51a9f5b298346bf0f748d11a4eb723bdfc946a
Signed-off-by: jmac <james.macnider@amdocs.com>
Issue-ID: OOM-899

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

This is the state now for SDN-C with this change:

$ kubectl get pods -n onap
NAME                                          READY     STATUS             RESTARTS   AGE
devel-sdnc-0                                  2/2       Running            0          16m
devel-sdnc-db-0                               2/2       Running            2          16m
devel-sdnc-dgbuilder-687c5c8884-zqcx8         1/1       Running            0          16m
devel-sdnc-dmaap-listener-5fc6789665-bvn6b    1/1       Running            0          16m
devel-sdnc-nfs-provisioner-79fb4648c8-j4z52   1/1       Running            0          16m
devel-sdnc-portal-7886b86d7d-vklj6            0/1       CrashLoopBackOff   5          16m
devel-sdnc-ueb-listener-67cd66fbfd-v5vtf      1/1       Running            0          16m

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2 Verified+1

Verified.
sdnc portal still has problems, but sdnc seems to come up without significant errors in log.
Just:
ERROR 1364 (HY000) at line 1: Field 'aic_site_id' doesn't have a default value
11:31:09.007 [main] ERROR o.o.c.sli.core.sli.SvcLogicLoader - Activation entry [ASDC-API  vf-license-model-update          0.2.1-SNAPSHOT    sync] is declared at line number 1 in the file /opt/onap/sdnc/svclogic/graphs/asdcapi/graph.versions and is invalid.
11:31:09.789 [main] ERROR o.o.c.sli.core.sli.SvcLogicLoader - hasGraph returned false for ActivationEntry [module=GENERIC-RESOURCE-API, rpc=vf-module-topology-operation-assign, version=1.3.1-SNAPSHOT, mode=sync]

root@borislav-oom-rancher:~/onap/master/oom/kubernetes# kgpa | grep sdnc
onap          aaa-sdnc-0                                     2/2       Running                 0          1h
onap          aaa-sdnc-db-0                                  2/2       Running                 0          1h
onap          aaa-sdnc-dgbuilder-fb8fb7ff6-c2klh             1/1       Running                 0          1h
onap          aaa-sdnc-dmaap-listener-7d85c7dcf8-zb2qq       1/1       Running                 0          1h
onap          aaa-sdnc-nfs-provisioner-784647cbdc-l5z6m      1/1       Running                 0          1h
onap          aaa-sdnc-portal-d866d59c8-svbsd                0/1       Running                 6          1h
onap          aaa-sdnc-ueb-listener-55c7447d5c-lsrtt         1/1       Running                 0          1h
Change has been successfully merged by Borislav Glozman
